creator: dirk@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I disabled gd support for apache13-php4. Bill Fumerola already stressed 
that the module isn't able to deal with newer versions of gd. So the 
gd support in PHP-4 has to be upgraded. Unfortually the PHP-4 people didn't 
even upgrade the gd support in the php4-CVS-repository.
